name: Jabal ibn Ali
title: Brave of Shayban
shortDescription: One of the braves of Kufa who fought in Siffin and attained martyrdom in the first attack on Ashura.
fullStory:
Jabal ibn Ali al-Shaybani was one of the brave and sincere Shias of Kufa. He had the honor of participating in the Battle of Siffin alongside Amir al-Mu'minin Ali (AS) and had tasted the fight against falsehood.

When the Master of Martyrs' (AS) caravan reached Karbala, Jabal ibn Ali managed to bypass the siege rings of Ibn Ziyad's forces in Kufa and joined the Imam's companions.

On the day of Ashura, he stood in the front line of the defenders of the Ahl al-Bayt. When the enemy started showering arrows on the morning of Ashura (the first attack), after a brave fight alongside a large group of companions, he sacrificed his life for Islam and his Imam.

His name is mentioned in Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya, where the Imam sends greetings to this loyal companion.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى جَبَلِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الشَّيْبانيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Jabal ibn Ali al-Shaybani...
